'''Quat Ralto''' was the first officer and security chief of the ''[[Bright Seeker]]'' mining survey ship. He was a stern, competent [[Gender/Legends|man]] with a strict honor code. Although he was a member of a [[House Calipsa]] crew, he made a point of treating all aboard the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] with respect.

He was killed by [[Janos Marsh]] when Ralto interrupted him contacting the rival [[House Melantha]] in the transceiver room of the ''Bright Seeker''. Janos acted instinctively, [[Death/Legends|killing]] him with a low-powered blaster shot to the head. His wound was still smoking when his body was discovered by other members of the ''Bright Seeker'' crew.

==Appearances==
